sql_array: CREATE TABLE stylesheets (id INT PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255));
UPDATE stylesheets SET uri = 'virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/stylesheets/updated_document.xsl' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT uri FROM stylesheets WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xslt_stale(uri) FROM stylesheets WHERE id = 1;
